name: fudoki-js
description: 纯JS版本的日语学习工具，支持分词和语音朗读

scripts.frontend:build: npm run prepare:system-dic && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: npm run prepare:system-dic && npm run frontend:build && cargo run --release
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:system-dic && npm run frontend:build && cargo run
scripts.serve: npm run prepare:system-dic && npm run frontend:build && cargo run --release
scripts.test: npm run resources:test && npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:build && cargo test

author: Cheyan
